text:
Created attachment 181997
patch for geom_gpt test

The patch fixes the following warning.

/usr/src/tools/regression/geom_gpt/gctl.t ........................................... /usr/src/tools/regression/geom_gpt/test.c:147:3: warning: implicit declaration of function 'gctl_dump' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
